title: All In 1
description: A balanced (Neo)Forge modpack that brings exploration, tech, magic, building, and QoL together into one complete experience.
body:
All In 1 is a (Neo)Forge modpack designed to bring every style of Minecraft gameplay together in one balanced experience.
Adventure, technology, magic, performance, building—this pack includes hand-picked mods from every category to create a complete, all-purpose sandbox.

Explore new biomes, build advanced tech factories, dive into new dimensions, automate everything, or just relax with better world generation and quality-of-life upgrades.
All In 1 is perfect for players who want variety without chaos, performance without compromise, and content without losing the vanilla feel.

**Which version should I play?**

- Forge 1.20.1: Maximum mod compatibility, largest mod selection, best for long-term worlds and servers.

- NeoForge 1.21.1: Better performance and faster load times, newer Minecraft version, slightly fewer mods.

**Features:**

- 🌲 New biomes, dungeons, and world generation
  
- ⚙️ Tech mods including machines, energy, automation
  
- 🪄 Magic & adventure mods with spells, dimensions, and bosses
  
- 🏗️ Building mods for improved creativity
  
- 🧠 Quality of life improvements that don’t break immersion
  
- 🚀 Performance optimizations for smoother gameplay
  
- 👥 Perfect for survival, multiplayer, and long-term worlds

A true all-in-one survival-adventure experience.


If you have found any bugs/issues please report it to the issue tracker. Thanks!
